titleStmt.title: SII 9.255: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 255. (A.R. No. 92 of 1904.) ON THE 8TH SLAB SET UP TO THE SOUTH OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE IN BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 11th year of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva (II), Vibhava, Pushya, Puṇṇami, Sōmavāra, Sōma-grahaṇa Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa. The date is not regular; the details correspond to A.D. 1148 December 26 Sunday, not Monday as stated, Uttarāyaṇa 2. There was no lunar eclipse on the day. It states that while the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jagadēkamalla-Vīrapāṇḍyadēva was ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand, a certain Bhaṭṭara Mādiyaṇṇa granted some plots of land for payment to 7 Brāhmans engaged in conducting the worship of the god Kalidēva and for offerings etc. to the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastaṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailō
kyanagarārambhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . namaḥ śivāya .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājā
dhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cā
ḷūkyābharaṇa śrīmatpratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvara
vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁ
drārkatāraṁ salluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhiga
tapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ śrīmajjagadēkamallavīrapā
ṇḍyadēvaru noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsiramumaṁ sukha
saṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . śrīmaccāḷukya
pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvavarṣada 11 neya vibhavasaṁ
vatsarada puṣyada puṇnami sōmavāra sōmagrahaṇa Uttarāyaṇa
saṁkrānti vyatīpātadaṁdu śrīmatu hariścaṁdradattiya mahā
grahāraṁ bāḷguḷiyūroḍeyapramukhavaśēṣamahājanamayvadiṁba
ra sa(ṁ)nnidhānadalu śrīmatu kalidēvargge prativarṣaṁ lakkha gaḍuge nimi
ttavāgiyalliyargghavāṇiyaṁ taharu nālvaru puḻpamaniksu
va gaḍugeyaṁ kuḍuva japaṁ mārppavarmūvaru Antu 7 mā
nasa brāhmaṇarggaṁ pratyēkaṁ tiṁgaḷudiṁgaḷiṁge Ēḷu paṇavaḍḍa dakṣi
ṇegavavara bhōjanakkaṁ dēvara raṁgabhōganivēdya sugandhadravyakka
vendu bhaṭṭara mādiyaṇnaṁ dēvara śrīpādadalu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ biṭṭa
meṇḍavāḷatōṁṭaṁ kamma nālvattaydu cāmeyageṟeya mo
dala kaḍabana gaṟde Ayvattu © Ī dharmmamanayvadiṁbaruṁ svadharmma
diṁ pratipāḷisuvaru . gaḷagaḷaneyadhōgatigiradiḷivarkṣaṇadiṁ
vaṁcanāmiṣameṁboṁdaḷipiṁdaṁ dharmmaṁgaḷanaḷidavaruṁ dharmadartthavaṁ
tiṁdavaruṁ . kōṭipayaṁkavileyaneḷkōṭitapōdhanara vēdavidaraṁ ha
nnirkkōṭiyane kōṭitīrthade kōṭimahādinadoḷaḷidanintidanaḷidaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.255 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
